titleStmt.title: SII 8.599: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 599. (A.R. No. 290 of 1903). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrī . śakābda]m 1000 5 100 6 10 4 Itiṉmel collāniṉṟa
citrabhā ṉuṉāmasamvatsara ttu minaṉāyattu pūrvvapakṣa ttu tri tiyaiyum
bhānuvāsara mum peṟṟa Aśva tinakṣatra ttu nāḷ śrī coḻamaṇṭalam kāveri
yāṟṟukku teṟku tiruccirāyppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi rājagambhī ravaḷanāṭu maḻaināṭu teṉ
karai Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu melpilāṟṟu tirupparāyttuṟai nāyaṉār Ātināyanāṟkkum
pacumpoṉṉammaikkum citrabhānu varuṣam paṅkuṉimātam 10 3 tiyati śrīmatu viśva nātha ṉā
yakkar tirumalaiṉāyakkarayyaṉavarkaḷ puṇṇiyamāka Ariyācciyammaṉ pu
tra ṉ Alluṇṭu peṟṟuṉāyakkarayyanum Ādicaṇḍeśva raṉ kovilp pa
ṇṭārattārum Aviṣekam periyiṉāThis may stand perhaps for periyaṉāyaṉār.paṇṭārattukku ca ṇṭeśva rappaṭṭa
yam kuṭuttapaṭi . muṉṉāḷ Āṉanta varuṣam puraṭṭātimātam mutalāka Aviṣeka kaṭṭaḷaikku kū
ṭiṉa nilam taṇṭopaḷappayyaṉ Uḷkkaṭaiyil cīraṅkam yekāṅki caṭaikopayaṉ kai
yilk koṇṭa nilam 1nta Allūr pirāmaṇar kaiyilk koṇṭa nilam Unta �2 Ariyā
cciyammaṉṉavarkaḷ melaiuḷkkaṭai paṇṇainilam 2 10 1 I tiruttik kūṭi
ṉa nilam 2nta2 Uḷḷūril ñāniyārāyitiruttum palatiru
ttum kūṭiṉa nilam �1 I kuruvappayyaṉ kumāraṉ citamparecura Ayyaṉ pāḷaiya
m tiruttik kūṭina nilam � ciraṅkam caṭaikopayaṉ kaiyil koṇṭa nila
m Oṉṟemukkālil mutaliyappapiḷḷai koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam nta� Āka nañcainilam 8nta�
puñcainilam karuṇālayam kuḻi 1000- ttukku nilam []i peṇkaḷkoyil kuḻi 1000- ttukku nilam I piṭārikoyilt toppu
kuḻi 2 100 Ottaiyāvaṭit toppu kuḻi 2 100 māṟṟaṟiyumperumāḷ toppu kuḻi 100 Āka kuḻi 2 1000 5 100- kku puñcainilam 1va
Āka nañcai puñcai Uḷpaṭa nilam 2 10�2 Inta nilattil Uṇṭāṉa Utaiyamum pāḷaiyampakutiyum coḻaṉkumāra
ttikku narimukamtītta tevarkaḷcelvar tampirāṉāṟkum pacumpoṉṉammaikkum Api
ṣekam neyivettiyam tiruviḷakku tiṅkaḷttirumatit tirutterāka kaṭṭaḷaittiru
ṉāḷppaṭi naṭattivarac colli nammiṭa nirupamum caṇṭecurappaṭṭaiyamum kuṭuttu
ApiṣekamperiyiṉāThis may stand perhaps for periyaṉāyaṉār.paṇṭārattaik kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle Inta taṉmattai putti
rarputtirapāramparaiyum cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattivaravum . Inta taṉ
mattukku yātāmoruvaṉ vikkiṉampaṇṇiṉa Avaṉ keṅkaikkaraiyilk karām
pacuvaik koṇṇa toṣattilum tevappirāmaṇaraik koṇṇa toṣa
ttilumt taṉ matāpitāvaik koṇṇa toṣattilum pokakkaṭavarākavum . tha yaṉāyakkar Ayyaṉ Oppam
Digital edition of SII 8.599 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
